name: @stackra/csp
purpose: Content-Security-Policy runtime — nonce generation, policy header building, feature-scoped source registry with discovery, and React bindings.
capabilities: CSP policy header building with directive merging
Testing subpath with policy assertion utilities
when_to_use: Wiring nonce-based Content-Security-Policy for a Vite/SSR app with per-feature source contributions.
when_not_to_use: For plain security headers unrelated to CSP use the deployment layer; for auth headers use @stackra/http.
